name: Quarterly Business Review
description: Structured review of account health, results, and forward planning

phases.name: Results Review
phases.guidance: Review outcomes. Ask: What results stood out this quarter?

phases.name: Value Delivered
phases.guidance: Reinforce value. Ask: How has our solution impacted your key metrics?

phases.name: Challenges Faced
phases.guidance: Address concerns early. Ask: What challenges have you faced with our solution?

phases.name: Goals Ahead
phases.guidance: Align on future. Ask: What are your top priorities for next quarter?

phases.name: Expansion
phases.guidance: Explore growth. Ask: Are there other teams that could benefit from this?

outputFormat: 2-4 bullets to guide the QBR conversation forward
